$comment: Default plugins + jobs repos errandd installs at boot. Gitops: this file is the source of truth. `marketplaces` installs ALL plugins each repo's marketplace.json declares; `cherryPick` installs only the named plugins from a repo; `jobsRepos` are the daemon's default routine repos.

cherryPick.$comment: First-party (anthropics/claude-plugins-official), trusted. Review/PR/git workflow + codebase intelligence for a daemon that opens & reviews PRs. NOTE: the LSP plugins (pyright/typescript) only start if their language-server binary is present in the image; they install harmlessly and no-op where it isn't.
daisyui's marketplace also declares `daisyui-blueprint` (a paid-license MCP server) — cherry-pick ONLY the free `daisyui` skill so preflight never installs the paid one.
